description: Revel in the comfort of pure leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of sandals from enroute. Pair it with any kind of ethnic or western wear and look great both ways.This pair comes with a shoe bag to help you carry it around in ease.UpperSoft leather straps braided on the forefoot and running along the midfoot length forming a toe separator, and an ankle strap with an adjustable buckle to customise the Fit and lock the foot in placePadded leather footbed for all day comfortOutsoleDurable PU outsole grooved at the forefoot with a grooved heel patch in rubber for absolute grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
